summary:
The available literature did not provide insights into optimal brushing methods for managing gingival recession; thus, a widely recognized technique such as the Bass method was selected based on general recommendations. No suitable evidence-based conclusion could be drawn specifically addressing the asked topic within the current dataset. \boxed{\text{Bass}} Summary:

No reliable evidence related to brushing techniques for gingival recession was found among the sources reviewed. Consequently, the Bass technique—an accepted approach—was chosen based on common dental practice guidelines. \boxed{\text{Bass}}
